data.content: Plan review approved. The implementation plan is complete, correct, and feasible. Key points: (1) comparison of deployed SKILL.md content against render_skill() output is the right approach, (2) 465/500 line limit on managed_skills.rs is correctly identified with mitigation to move logic to output.rs or a new helper, (3) test strategy covers drift-only, mixed missing+drift, fix reconciliation, and CLI regression, (4) no invariant violations, (5) no security or performance concerns. Ready for implementation.
